python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-03-03':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

QID: 157054

Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-25. Congressional hearings on defense and foreign policy sometimes draw protests. If a senator is publicly identified as physically assisting police in removing a protester from such a meeting, this question asks for that senator's name.
---

Title: What club will hand Manchester United interim boss Michael Carrick his first defeat by March 14, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-26. Manchester United are playing under an interim coach after a managerial change. The team have several matches to play before mid-March, and that run could include the coach's first loss.
---

Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. The US House Oversight Committee is examining how the Justice Department handles sensitive records connected to Jeffrey Epstein. House committees can call witnesses and issue subpoenas as part of oversight investigations.
---
QID: 68828
Title: Which chief executive will publicly say by March 2026 that his company is set to invest another $30bn in OpenAI and that this might be its last investment until OpenAI goes public?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. OpenAI is a private AI company that depends on large outside funding and expensive computing infrastructure. Major technology firms may publicly discuss whether they will keep investing in the company before any future stock-market listing.
---

---
